cases.input: Create GitHub issues from our authentication backlog. We have 2 epics, 4 features, and 12 user stories with parent-child relationships.
cases.context: Repository: acme-corp/platform-api, GitHub MCP server connected, milestone: v2.0, backlog file at project/specs/backlog/auth-backlog.md

cases.input: Before creating GitHub issues, check for existing issues in the repository to avoid duplicates.
cases.context: Repository has 45 open issues, backlog has 18 new items, some titles may overlap with existing work

cases.input: How should backlog work item types and priorities be mapped to GitHub issue labels and issue types?
cases.context: GitHub issue types available: Epic, Feature, Bug, Enhancement; priority labels: must/should/could; story points as labels

cases.input: After creating parent issues for epics and features, establish the sub-issue hierarchy for child stories.
cases.context: Parent issue numbers captured from issue_write calls, 12 user stories need parent-child links via sub_issue_write

cases.input: After creating all GitHub issues, how do we verify completeness and what summary information should be captured?
cases.context: Expected 20 issues created, search_issues for verification, backlog-summary.md update required with issue URLs
